category_sources: source_facts.description: CLI tool for Dolby Vision metadata on video streams.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/quietvoid/dovi_tool, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Dolby Vision metadata handling for video streams; source_facts.package-manager includes dovi-tool package names.
